title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・最初の証

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the spring Tenno Sho over, Tamamo Cross is
ecstatic to have left a mark on the very turf her
father adores so much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, however, Tamamo Cross
receives a terrifying call from her family.
Astonished, she freezes on the spot.
